name: Pat Sczebel
title: Worship Leader & Songwriter
tagline: Wrote 'Jesus, Thank You' — a beloved communion hymn in Reformed churches
bio: Sovereign Grace worship leader and songwriter known for penning 'Jesus, Thank You,' one of the most widely sung communion hymns in Reformed and evangelical churches. His songs are marked by a clear proclamation of the gospel and the finished work of Christ on the cross.
faith: Sczebel's songwriting reflects a deep gratitude for the substitutionary atonement of Christ, beautifully expressed in 'Jesus, Thank You' with its vivid portrayal of what Christ accomplished at Calvary. His work within Sovereign Grace Churches has contributed to a rich body of theologically grounded worship music. His songs help congregations respond to the gospel with wonder and thanksgiving.

sources.title: Sovereign Grace Music
sources.note: Publisher of Pat Sczebel's worship songs
